description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to main and develop branches, on pull requests to those branches, on a scheduled cron job, and on workflow dispatch and call. The workflow has two jobs: build and automerge. The build job runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, checking out the code, setting up Python, installing dependencies, testing, building docs, checking code, validating the package, and testing downstream for specific configurations. The automerge job auto-approves and merges Dependabot pull requests.
